verified_code_points: Table and Inspector use an explicit active/cancelled/committed content-edit state machine; Escape suppresses blur commit and Enter plus blur creates one transaction
Inspector derives actual text/family inheritance state rather than selection-count labels
one Inspector exposes Content and Appearance with a future Symbol seam; Appearance families are Cell, Membrane and Void
Boundary and Core are nested under Cell; Membrane Edge is nested under Membrane; six canonical internal targets remain separate
Dock exposes one-click Inspector and active-family Detail plus creation, Saved, Random, Import and Export
Classic and Organism share all six Boundary styles with no solid coercion; dash-dot and segmented bars have distinct deterministic patterns
Core-off projects no Canvas2D centre fill; production nuclei debug is ring-only while the isolated lab retains explicit diagnostic dots
Void excludes Cell, Boundary and Core presentation and remains regression-protected
reported_verification: exactly one final production build passed with accepted chunk warning
PNG, SVG and PDF flows reached Complete
review_limit: The assistant cannot open the worker's localhost preview URL; final visual approval remains with the Owner.
merge_policy: Never merge automatically. Owner must explicitly command MERGE C0-M1. Merge only exact corrected head 484ddeb859fcb18256a6acf7b7287e2be917aedc into main by non-forced fast-forward after re-verification.
next_milestone: Present and refine M2 Owner Preview before any Codex dispatch; M2 starts only after M1 merge and explicit GO CODEX M2.
